hub.title: WishList App Blog - Wishlists, Gifts & Tips
hub.description: I've been making lists since I was six - wishlists 🎁 for every holiday, to-dos for every week. I built WishList App from that same habit. Here I write about what I've actually learned: good wishlists, the apps worth using, and why a short list 📝 beats a crowded head every time.
hub.keywords: wishlist blog, best wishlist apps, birthday wishlist, Secret Santa, gift registry

byline: I run WishList App and write these posts myself - feedback welcome anytime.

how-lists-change-your-life.title: Why I've Been Making Lists My Whole Life
how-lists-change-your-life.desc: My personal story with lists - from childhood wishlists to productivity habits - and a holiday wishlist guide for every occasion.

best-wishlist-apps-2026.title: Best Wishlist Apps in 2026
best-wishlist-apps-2026.desc: What I look for in a wishlist app after building one, plus a straight comparison table.

amazon-wishlist-alternatives.title: Amazon Wishlist Alternatives
amazon-wishlist-alternatives.desc: When you want more flexibility than a single store - and why I built a store-agnostic list.

how-to-create-a-birthday-wishlist.title: How to Create a Birthday Wishlist
how-to-create-a-birthday-wishlist.desc: My checklist for a birthday list guests actually use - from naming to sharing.

wishlist-vs-gift-registry.title: Wishlist vs Gift Registry
wishlist-vs-gift-registry.desc: Side-by-side: flexibility, guests, and where WishList App fits.

best-secret-santa-apps.title: Best Secret Santa Apps
best-secret-santa-apps.desc: Picking tools for draws and wishlists - including what I optimize for in my own app.
